title: Sofia's Happy Numbers
synopsis: Join Sofia as she counts from one to five while exploring different emotions, from one happy clap to five sleepy yawns.

pages.text: One happy clap! Sofia feels joy.

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes clapping her hands once with a big smile, surrounded by one large colorful number 1

pages.text: Two excited jumps! Up and down!

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes jumping twice in the air, with two bright number 2s floating around her
Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes laughing with three colorful number 3s and musical notes around her face
Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes hugging four stuffed animals, with four decorated number 4s in each corner
illustration.alt: Sofia hugging stuffed animals with number 4

pages.text: Five sleepy yawns. Time for bed!

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes yawning sleepily, with five gentle number 5s floating like clouds above her head

metadata.illustrationStyle: clear countable objects, fun patterns, numbers prominent, visual counting, each number unique scene, engaging practice, organized arrangement, mathematical beauty

questions.question: How many times did Sofia clap?
questions.explanation: Sofia made one happy clap at the beginning of the story.

questions.question: What did Sofia do three times?
questions.explanation: Sofia giggled three times - hee hee hee!

questions.question: How many yawns made Sofia sleepy?
questions.explanation: Sofia had five sleepy yawns before bedtime.
